title: Puck News’ Ioffe on How Europe Might React to Iran Attack
description: Puck News Washington Correspondent Julia Ioffe discusses the attack on Iran and says it reminds her of 2021-2022 US engagements with Russia regarding Ukraine. She speaks with David Gura and Christina Ruffini on “This Weekend.” (Source: Bloomberg)
